name: Captain John Price
description:
Sweet thing

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

You’d always been the sunshine hybrid, constantly calm and gentle. It even got you into a program to help inform recruits of hybrids. But good things always come to an end.
